orgPolicy.title: 🆕 Invite PEs: Expanded Greenhouse Self-Service
orgPolicy.summary: PEs can now create Evergreen & Confidential reqs and close/reopen reqs directly in Greenhouse — no ticket needed.
bullets: Create Evergreen and Confidential requisitions directly in Greenhouse.
Close and re-open your reqs in Greenhouse without submitting a PHC ticket.
EIB bulk req uploads are still ticket-based (via PHC), but questions go to HRIS Ops team now — not Invite Ops.

tp.point: You now have more self-service in Greenhouse — share this with your team so they know the updated process.

orgPolicy.title: 🔴 Gusto Role & Team Language Update: Domains, Actions, No Seniority Titles
orgPolicy.summary: Per Josh: Gusto is shifting away from 'Apps' and 'Products' terminology. Job postings and team comms must be updated.
bullets: Replace 'Apps' and 'Products' → 'Domains' and 'Actions' in all job postings and team communications.
Remove the following words from job postings and team comms: Senior, Principal, Director, Manager, Lead.
Goal: Focus language on role, responsibility, and scope rather than seniority labels.

tp.point: Language update required for all job postings — share with your team and make sure open reqs are updated. 'Domains/Actions' replaces 'Apps/Products'; seniority title words should be removed.

orgPolicy.title: Recruiters No Longer Handle Unhires
orgPolicy.summary: Recruiters will no longer be responsible for processing unhires directly. Michelle Eakin's team is taking this over.
bullets: The existing process remains: recruiters ping in #invite_notifications.
Michelle Eakin's team now owns the actual unhire action in the system.
No action required from recruiters beyond the existing notification step.

tp.point: Good news — recruiters no longer process unhires directly. The notification step in #invite_notifications stays the same.

orgPolicy.title: Laura Lockwood on Leave — Elan Bailey is Day-to-Day Contact
orgPolicy.summary: Laura is on leave effective June 22. Elan Bailey is the People Central day-to-day point of contact for the duration.
bullets: Effective June 22, Laura Lockwood is on leave.
Elan Bailey is now the day-to-day contact for People Central.
Saumya Chopra and Kristin Ruehle available for escalations.
Elan has been added to PE meetings and #invite-pes channel.

tp.point: Laura is out — direct People Central questions to Elan Bailey. Escalations go to Saumya or Kristin.

orgPolicy.title: Workday ↔ Google Calendar Integration Now Live
orgPolicy.summary: Time off submitted in Workday now automatically syncs to your Google Calendar and your PE's calendar.
bullets: No more manual calendar blocks — Workday time off auto-syncs to Google Calendar.
Your PE's calendar will also reflect your approved time off automatically.

tp.point: Workday PTO now syncs to Google Calendar automatically — no manual entry needed.

items.heading: People Team All Hands — Friday June 26
bullets: Topics: FY27 Company Goals and how People Team fits in, Cycle 2 initiatives, PeopleOS demos, and celebrations.
Worth tuning in — major strategic direction being shared.

items.heading: 🔴 Independence Day (Observed) — Gusto Closed Friday July 3
bullets: Gusto is closed Friday, July 3rd.
Plan interview scheduling, offers, and candidate comms around this date — 8 days away.
Source: Gusto FY27 Holiday Calendar + #invite-team, June 23

items.heading: Invite Onsite — July 13–14 in Denver
bullets: July 13 PE schedule: arrive 9am, finalize onsite details 9:30–12pm, team lunch 12–3:30pm, Pedal Hopper around RiNo 3:30–5pm, Welcome Party at Bierstadt Lagerhaus from 5pm.
More details coming from PEs. Activity voting survey was open (EOD Wednesday June 25).
Temp channel for onsite comms: #temp-invite-onsite-july-2026

items.heading: FY27 Company KRs — Ratification Expected July 1
bullets: Five objectives total; new Product/Agentic category focused on Gus (Gusto's agentic platform).
Objective 5 KRs most relevant to Invite: job family consolidation and hiring within Gusto hubs.
DRIs finalizing recommended targets this week ahead of State of Gusto.

items.heading: Cycle 2 People Team Priorities Set
bullets: Theme 1 — AI-Native Gusties: role redesign and raising the talent bar across the employee lifecycle (including VMA+ evolution).
Theme 2 — Modernize Delivery of People Work: vendor decisions (scheduling tool, Risotto replacement, VMS), getting off Lattice, policy/practices repo, total rewards automation.
Kristin is a named DRI on 'Raising the Talent Bar' alongside Dashini Jeyathurai.

items.heading: Invite PE Hub Launched in Notion
bullets: New centralized hub for PE action items, cascade messages, and meeting notes.
React to any #invite-pes message with 📋 to auto-log as an action item.
Hub: https://app.notion.com/p/383ad673c6c2816886d2d98e7e1996f3

items.heading: Project Orbit — Mentorship Program Launched
bullets: Quarterly PE mentorship program pairing ICs with PE mentors outside their day-to-day.
Survey for FTE team members due Friday June 26, 5pm PT.
Survey link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdPEN0sG4G0kwiLNAZ7FcdozdKrMcQ_SzEyLXxSTLyxjJit8g/viewform

items.heading: VMA Practice Simulator Pilot — Nominate 1 Recruiter by July 22
bullets: Lisa Pham is coordinating a pilot for the new VMA Practice Simulator.
Looking for 1 recruiter per team to test and provide feedback.
Send your nominee to Lisa by Monday, July 22.

items.heading: Goose — People Insights Tool Demo'd
bullets: Arthur Gonzalez (People Insights) demoed Goose today.
People Insights will work with Invite PEs to align on communication, usage, and functionality before broader launch.

keyEvents.theme: ✅ PE Action Items (from Invite PE Hub)

items.heading: 🟡 Mid-Quarter Check-In Prep — Due July 3
bullets: Come to next 1:1s with high-level thoughts on team performance and IC tracking.
Due: July 3

items.heading: 🟡 Define AI Levels for Invite — Due July 3
bullets: Define what 'Integrator,' 'Innovator,' and 'Amplifier' look like for Invite with specific examples.
Share with Scott for approval.
Due: July 3

items.heading: 🟢 Build Quarterly All Hands Template — Due July 15
bullets: Build the All Hands template ahead of the team All Hands scheduled July 31st.
